messages.content: Fetch CNN Fear & Greed Index from https://money.cnn.com/data/fear-and-greed/ — extract the current index value (0-100). Return just the number. If blocked, fallback to VIX from https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/%5EVIX/

I'll fetch the CNN Fear & Greed Index by making an HTTP request to the page and extracting the index value.

**Fetching CNN Fear & Greed Index:**
```
bash
curl -s https://money.cnn.com/data/fear-and-greed/ | grep -i "fear.greed" | head -20
```

Let me try this and see what we get:
```
curl -sL "https://money.cnn.com/data/fear-and-greed/" 2>&1 | head -100
```
